artifact_correctness.detail: 39/41 skill artifacts produced with all required fields including new depends_on/produces. 2 minor gaps: SIM_008 and SIM_009 are first-run scenarios pending full validation. All 5 prompt templates created, filling the prompts/ gap.

defect_detection_rate.detail: 9/9 simulation injected defects fully detected. SIM_008 PII leak detected by SEC log audit exit criteria. SIM_009 cascading failure detected by SDE force-unwrap check + QA revocation test case.

defect_escape_rate.detail: 0/9 injected defects escaped. Privacy violation and cascading failure both caught before Launch phase.

time_to_go_no_go_min.detail: No release gate executed this cycle

test_coverage.detail: 9/9 simulation scenarios executed (expanded from 7 to 9). MAST coverage: 10/14 failure modes (up from 8).

flake_rate.detail: All simulation scenarios produced deterministic results

perf_regression_rate.detail: No performance baseline for orchestrator itself

security_issue_rate.detail: No security issues. PII privacy violation scenario validates SEC detection capability.

cost_per_run_usd.detail: Local-only execution; no API costs this cycle

orchestration_reliability.detail: All state transitions completed including new DEPENDENCY_VALIDATION state and event bus emission. Event bus schema validated.

human_intervention_rate.detail: No human override needed this cycle

skill_completion_rate.detail: 40/41 skill definitions have complete, binary, verifiable exit criteria with depends_on/produces. PE battery and UX complication exit criteria gaps filled. 1 remaining gap: SKILL_PE_BATTERY_IMPACT Instruments profiling requires device-only validation.

overall_weighted_score.detail: Weighted: artifact_correctness(0.2)*0.95 + defect_detection(0.2)*1.00 + test_coverage(0.15)*1.00 + orchestration_reliability(0.15)*1.00 + skill_completion(0.15)*0.98 + security(0.15)*1.00 = 0.96

verdict_rationale: Overall weighted score 0.96 > baseline 0.91. Improvements: skill_completion_rate 0.93→0.98 (PE/UX exit criteria fixed, dependency metadata added to all 41 skills), artifact_correctness 0.90→0.95 (prompt templates created, filling prompts/ gap), MAST coverage 8→10 of 14. No regressions.
